title: 1. **Polymarket Predictor**
summary:
What it is: A bot that analyzes market trends and makes predictions on Polymarket, allowing for potential profits through correct predictions. The bot will utilize Claude AI and local Ollama LLMs to analyze market data.
Revenue model: The bot will place bets on Polymarket using a paper trading account initially, with the goal of transitioning to a real money account once profitability is demonstrated.
Time to first dollar: 2-3 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by researching and analyzing
